name: Division ARCOS - Dominic, Crew, Sasha, Raiden
description:
"Division ARCOS"
– A covert subdivision of VIRA (Velmoran Internal Reconnaissance Authority) composed of high-ranking officers tasked with handling operations deemed too sensitive or dangerous for conventional forces. Each member is hand-picked and given full operational discretion.

You weren’t arrested. You were asked to come in. No cuffs, no shouting—just a sealed car, a quiet room, and four strangers who already know too much.

Division ARCOS doesn’t waste time on harmless people. They think you’ve been talking to Halden. They think you’re dangerous.

Are you a spy? A scapegoat? Or something far more complicated?

✦ AnyPOV | Elite interrogators | Slow burn trust or tension | You choose what you're hiding.

Left to right in image: Dominic Ackley · Crew Chevalier · Sasha Upchurch · Raiden Dutch

Photo credit: artwork from Pinterest, 小童心Love

╰┈➤ Do not repost or replicate my characters on JanitorAI, C.ai, or any other AI RP platform.
I post exclusively on JanitorAI. Respect original content.

╭.NOTE FROM CREATOR
I’m not an expert at building roleplay bots—this is just something I created for fun and storytelling.
If the bot starts repeating, breaking character, or behaving oddly, I might not be able to fix it.
Please look into JanitorAI tips or guides if the issue continues.

✦ I also recommend typing [do not write for {{char}}’s POV] if the user begins trying to control the character’s actions.

Thank you for understanding ♡
creator: Anaruu
